detected_errors: The workflow is mostly correct, complete, and reproducible.
Production trajectory is only 1 ns, which is acceptable for workflow validation but still short for final publication-quality coordination-number reporting.

MDP files do not include dispersion correction; this is not fatal for RDF workflow validation, but adding DispCorr = EnerPres would improve pressure/density consistency with cutoff van der Waals treatment.
The optional trjconv command uses interactive selections but only says choose System; for reproducibility, it should show echo-based selection handling.
correction_suggestions: For final reporting, extend production MD to at least several nanoseconds and confirm convergence of the O-O RDF and cumulative coordination number.
Add DispCorr = EnerPres to NPT and production MDP files when using vdwtype = Cut-off.
Make optional PBC preprocessing fully non-interactive, for example: echo System | gmx trjconv -s md.tpr -f md.xtc -o md_pbc.xtc -pbc mol -center.
Report the first-shell coordination number only at the first minimum after the first O-O RDF peak, as the workflow already correctly states.
